steps.title: Use plain plurals
steps.content: The phrase “the list of US ___ to have been led by a woman” refers to multiple places. Nothing in the sentence shows possession, so the nouns should be plural without apostrophes.

steps.title: Remove possessive forms
steps.content: Choice A makes “territory's” possessive. Choice B makes both nouns possessive, and Choice D makes “state's” possessive. The remaining option uses plain plural nouns for a list of places. The answer is C.
